cta.title: Choose your sponsor for season {season}
cta.body: A new sponsor deal is on the table. Compare the offers and lock in your backing for the upcoming season.
cta.pendingBody: You have chosen a deal for the upcoming season. You can still switch to a different offer.

offers.title: Sponsor offers
offers.subtitle: Choose a sponsor deal for season {season}. The contract runs from the start of that season.
offers.empty: No offers are available right now. A new deal can be negotiated once the current contract is up for renewal.

contract.title: Current sponsor
contract.error: Could not load your sponsor contract. Please try again.
